query:
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, period, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'Finans', 'Ciro /Hamburger Adedi', 'Aylık Restoran Cirosu / Satılan Hamburger Adedi', 'TL', 'Aylık', 15.0, 6460000.0, 6800000.0, 7819999.999999999, '2026/3', NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, period, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'Finans', 'Karlılık', 'Aylık Net Kar %si - Kira ve sabit giderlerden arındırılmış', '%', 'Aylık', 15.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, '2026/3', NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, period, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'Finans', 'Yan Ürün Satışı', '100 Burger Başına Satış /  Yan Ürün Satışı', '%', 'Aylık', 10.0, 0.05, 0.055, 0.06, '2026/3', NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
